item.title: 【ホロライブ】ときのそら、9周年記念イベント「9th Anniversary Party」をぴあアリーナMMで開催決定！「夢は、ひとつ先のステージへ」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の「ときのそら」さんが、自身のX（旧Twitter）および公式情報を更新し、活動9周年を記念するイベント『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』の開催を特報として発表しました。開催日は2026年11月7日（土）、会場は数多くのアーティストが伝説を残してきた「ぴあアリーナMM」です。特報を受け、ファン（そらとも）の間では早くも期待の声が高まっています。横浜の地に響き渡る歌声と、記念すべきパーティーがどのようなものになるのか、11月の開催に向けて注目が集まります。『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』は、2026年11月7日（土）にぴあアリーナMMにて開催予定です。

item.title: 常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんのサイン入り色紙が当たる！『灰仭巫覡』新PV＆オリジナルソング公開記念キャンペーン開催
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 大暮維人先生が描く人気漫画『灰仭巫覡（カイジンフゲキ）』のオリジナルソングと新PVの公開を記念し、2025年9月5日より豪華プレゼントキャンペーンがスタートしました。新PV公開！常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんが歌うオリジナルソング2025年9月3日、講談社の「マガジンチャンネル」にて『灰仭巫覡』の新たなプロモーションビデオが公開されました。このPVのために書き下ろされたオリジナルソング『君と明かした夜』は、ホロライブ所属の人気VTuberである常闇トワさんと獅白ぼたんさんが歌唱を担当。今回の発表を記念して、抽選で1名様にが当たるキャンペーンが開催されます。『灰仭巫覡』公式X（旧Twitter）アカウント（@KAIJINFUGEKI_WM）をフォロー ※「#灰仭巫覡PV公開」「#カイジンフゲキ」のハッシュタグが付いたポストが目印です。 2025年9月5日（金）0:00 〜 2025年9月14日（日）23:59まで 利用規約に同意し、日本国内にお住まいで郵便物・宅配物の受け取りが可能な方。注意事項：色紙には当選者の宛名が記載されます。当選者にはXのダイレクトメッセージにて連絡があります。 『灰仭巫覡』コミックス第1巻から第5巻まで好評発売中です。

item.title: 【速報】戌神ころね、ホンダのeスポーツ大会アンバサダーに2年連続で就任！→本人も「よろしくお願いします」と意気込み「世界の戌神」「今年もきた！」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 人気VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」所属の戌神ころねさんが、本田技研工業（Honda）が主催するeモータースポーツのグローバル大会「Honda Racing eMS 2025」の公式アンバサダーに、昨年に引き続き就任したことが発表されました。このニュースに、ファンからは「2年連続はすごすぎる！」「今年も応援します！」といった声が相次いでいます。「Honda Racing eMS」は、世界3地区（アジア・オセアニア、米州、欧州・中東・アフリカ）のトップドライバーたちが地域最速の座をかけて競い合う、本格的なeモータースポーツのグローバル大会です。戌神さんは「Honda Racing eMS 2024」でもアンバサダーを務めており、今回で2年連続という大役を担うことになります。ゲーム実況で人気を誇る戌神ころねと、世界のHondaとのコラボが再び実現しました。2025年8月26日、Honda Racing eMSの公式X（旧Twitter）アカウントが「━ Honda Racing eMS 2025 開催 ━ 昨年に続き『戌神ころね』が公式アンバサダーに！」とポストし、戌神さんのアンバサダー就任を正式に発表。あわせて、されるという大会スケジュールも公開しました。この公式発表に対し、戌神さん本人も自身のXアカウントで「今年もアンバサダーを務めさせていただきます！よろしくお願いします」と引用ポストし、就任への意気込みを表明しました。この就任のニュースに、ファンからは「世界のHondaに認められた女、戌神ころね」「ころさんの影響力すごい！」「これを機にレースゲームに挑戦してみようかな」など、驚きと喜びのコメントがありました。

item.title: Aki Rosenthal’s Belly Dance Gestures From the Birthday Encore Now on Sale!
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!The “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” event that was held on March 13 in Holoearth is now available as a 3D archive, featuring Aki Rosenthal from hololive 1st Generation.During the special segment held after the show, exclusive to Holoearth, two belly dance dance gestures performed by Aki Rosenthal are now being released as a special, limited launch!These gestures were created in response to a request from Aki Rosenthal during the event and faithfully recreate her energetic belly dance performance. ・Aki Rosenthal’s Belly Dance ・Aki Rosenthal’s Belly Dance Part 2Catch the Event Again in the 3D Archive!Experience the event again through the fully-preserved 3D archive! Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.Note: Those who already purchased the event ID holder can participate again. Those who do not yet have the event ID holder can participate by purchasing one. March 13 (Fri) 21:00 – April 13 (Mon), 2026 23:59Daily showtimes: ①8:00〜 ②10:00〜 ③12:00〜 ④14:00〜 ⑤16:00〜 ⑥19:00〜 ⑦20:00〜 ⑧21:00〜 ⑨22:00〜 ⑩23:00〜

item.title: 【5月21日発売】一番くじ ホロライブ ちょこのっこコレクション 2026ver.
item.author: jun3720
item.content:encoded: デスクなどにちょこんと飾れる「ちょこのっこ」フィギュア！デザイン新たに新登場！※活動休止中の赤井はあとは、本商品には含まれておりません。あらかじめご了承ください。︎販売開始26年5月21日(木)17:0017:00〜くじを引くには会員登録が必須です。事前に赤枠の「会員登録」から個人情報を登録しておきましょう。登録後マイページからクレジットカード情報も登録できます。②開始前にログインを済ます・回線の良い場所で通信をおこなう一番くじのオンライン販売はモタモタしていると混み合った状態で身動きできず、いつの間にか完売…となってしまいますので開始時間前には余裕を持ってログイン状態にしておきましょう。また、おそらく開始よりタッチの差の勝負になるため、できるだけ回線が良い環境（光回線のつながる場所、処理速度の速いPCでの接続など）で待機がおすすめです。オンライン販売では多くの箱が表示され、自分で好きな箱の中からくじを引くことができます。場合によっては何のグッズが残っているかも確認できます。「この箱は残数少ないからラスワンいけるかな〜」と、どの箱から引くかを悩んでる暇はないです。推しが残っているかを即座に確認し、購入ボタンを押しましょう。

item.title: Pre-Registration for the first Official hololive Mobile Game “hololive Dreams” is Open Globally!
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: March 11, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Headquarters: Minato-ku, Tokyo; President: Motoaki Tanigo) in collaboration with CyberAgent, Inc. (Headquarters: Shibuya-ku, Tokyo; President: Takahiro Yamauchi; TSE: 4751) and its consolidated subsidiary QualiArts, Inc. (Headquarters: Shibuya-ku, Tokyo; President: Yoshitatsu Tsujioka) have announced pre-registration for the first official hololive mobile game hololive Dreams (or holodori). Pre-registration is open for fans across the globe, excluding certain regions.Concurrent with the opening of pre-registration, new information regarding the upcoming mobile game was revealed during the hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 event, held across the weekend of March 6-8, 2026.The Full Scope of holodori Revealed!hololive Dreams (abbreviated as holodori) is the first official mobile game for the VTuber group hololive, featuring a massive roster of over 50 virtual YouTubers. The full details and the latest trailer were unveiled at hololive SUPER EXPO 2026. Watch the latest game trailer here: https://youtu.be/LQAm-2QHefE hololive Dreams is an Rhythm Game & RPG set in an amusement park. Set on a remote island, the player’s objective is to complete various facilities for the hololive members and build the magical “DREAM PARK” for everyone.Pre-Registration Campaigns: Three Campaigns Now LiveTo celebrate the start of pre-registration, the following three campaigns have been launched: All players will receive in-game items based on the total number of pre-registrations. Upon reaching the final milestone, rewards equivalent to 10 cumulative Gacha pulls will be granted to all users.Furthermore, if pre-registrations exceed 500,000, specially-designed advertising trucks featuring each of the 54 participating hololive members are scheduled to run in major cities worldwide. Participants can enter a giveaway for a chance to win premium prizes instantly, including the latest iPad Pro and various digital gift cards.3. hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME 15-Card Set Giveaway! Hashtag Posting Campaign! By following the official X account and posting with the hashtag #holodori_prereg, 100 winners will be selected to receive a 15-card set from the hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME (hOCG).For updates and new developments on the mobile game, please visit the official hololive Dreams website and X accounts. Pre-register today and stay tuned for this highly anticipated hololive gaming experience!Copyright: © COVER / © QualiArts, Inc. Publisher: QualiArts, Inc. Development/Operations: COVER Corporation / QualiArts, Inc.

item.title: Sakura Miko x HYTE Y70 PC Case and Keycap/ Desk Pad Bundle has been announced!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: March 6, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is proud to be partnering with HYTE, a leading manufacturer of cutting-edge PC components and peripherals, and hololive Gen 0’s Sakura Miko, announcing the Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko Case, and the Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle.As the latest case made in collaboration with HYTE, the Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko case will use black or white colorways and features custom artwork of Sakura Miko from renowned artist Rosuuri across all three of the Y70’s glass panels. In addition, Sakura Miko’s name and additional designs are integrated into the Y70’s trim, along with a customized and serialized back plate on the case’s back panel.Also announced today is the Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle. Included in the bundle is a 150-keycap set in Black or White colorways that feature Rosuuri’s Sakura Miko artwork, iconography, and JIS characters printed onto the keycaps, as well as a 900mm x 400mm desk pad that comes with every keycap set.Pre-orders will open in Q2 2026. To sign up for when pre-orders go live, please visit:http://hyte.co/miko.For residents outside of the US and Canada, please wait for more information on pricing and availability in local retail stores.■ Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko Case Pre-Order: Planned for Q2, 2026 Release Date: Q2-Q3 2026The Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko case will come in two versions, one that uses a black colorway, and another that uses a white colorway.■ Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle Pre-Order: Planned for Q2, 2026 Release Date: Q2-Q3 2026The Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap Set will come in two versions, one that uses a black colorway, and another that uses a white colorway. Both sets will include the same Desk Pad across each set.* Desk Pad Design is still under development. For any additional updates, please stay tuned to HYTE’s website and official social media channels.

item.content:encoded: 26年3月6日〜8日開催hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 & hololive 7th fes. で発表された情報、展示物を順次更新します。ReGLOSS音乃瀬奏儒烏風亭らでんさくらみこ/星街すいせい L size miCometベアブランド衣装Ver.白上フブキ L size百鬼あやめ L size兎田ぺこら L size宝鐘マリン L size 『Ⅲ』衣装Ver.こぼ・かなえる L size 『Ⅲ』衣装Ver.さくらみこ Date Style 私服衣装Ver.角巻わためIRySハコス・ベールズ古石ビジュー音乃瀬奏儒烏風亭らでんPOP UP PARADE フワワ・アビスガードPOP UP PARADE モココ・アビスガード・ガンダムエクシア【白上フブキ Ver.】・νガンダム【#さくらみこ Ver.】・クロスボーン・ガンダムX1【宝鐘マリン Ver.】・ユニコーンガンダム2号機 バンシィ・ノルン【輪堂千速 Ver.】・ガンプラ・コラボアパレル・食玩グッズ・hololive IF プライズフィギュア一番くじ ホロライブ ちょこのっこコレクション 2026ver.vol.6 (8月発売) / vol.7 (11月発売)プライズ #hololive IF シリーズ見本初公開#hololive IF -Relax time-儒鳥風亭らでんガンダム × ホロライブ #hololive IF 博衣こより・AXGRIT 第5弾企画『ホロライブEnglish -Myth-＆-Promise-』のPOP UP SHOP開催・ハコス・ベールズ スケールフィギュア発売決定hololive BASE on Tour! 2026 Duet Stage!・東京5/1〜10 西武渋谷店 (白上フブキ / 大神ミオ)5/22〜31 イオンモール名取(古石ビジュー / 音乃瀬奏)6/12〜21 イオンモール札幌苗穂（不知火フレア / 姫森ルーナ）7/3〜12 イオンモール岡崎（フワモコ）7/24〜8/2 イオンモールKYOTO（角巻わため / 綺々羅々ヴィヴィ）8/7〜16イオンモール筑紫野（雪花ラミィ / 博衣こより）9/4〜13 イオンモール幕張新都心(AZKi / ラプラス・ダークネス)・寝そべりミニマスコット・もちぴこBIGぬいぐるみなど…獅白ぼたん 見本初公開百鬼あやめ 商品化決定&情報初解禁新フェア「ウェスタンキャラバン」ビジュアル&参加タレント発表さくらみこ / 星街すいせい / アキ・ローゼンタール / 白銀ノエル / 兎田ぺこら / 姫森ルーナ / 尾丸ポルカ / 獅白ぼたん / 儒烏風亭らでん / 輪堂千速 / ???? / ????︎開催期間：26年4月〜7月アニメイトフェア・オンリーショップ巡回開催予定・4月18日〜5月10日【TEAM WEST】アニメイト福岡パルコ & 名古屋・5月16日〜6月7日【TEAM EAST】アニメイト横浜ビブレ【TEAM WEST】アニメイト秋葉原「スズキ × 輪堂千速」コラボバイクGSX250R [Chihaya Remix]展示 秘密結社holoX × GiGOキービジュアル公開 & キャンペーン日程決定アミューズメント・ショップコラボ開催予定ホロライブゲーマーズのキービジュアル公開・雪夜月 飲み比べセット発売決定（2026年春発売予定）・百年梅酒 ぺこら缶 初夏発売決定（2026年初夏発売予定）EXPO・fes現地に足を運んだ方のなかで掲載していいよ！というお写真があれば、ぜひご提供いただきたいです。後日このページ内にXのIDを明記の上掲載いたします。★注意点・ご自身が撮影したものをご提供ください・今後Xやサイト内で使用する可能性があります。この場合も都度XのIDを明記します。・全てを掲載することはできません。予めご了承下さい。

Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 “Monopoly” Encore Photo Contest Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!Support Campaign: “Monopoly” Encore Photo Contest!Outstanding entries will be featured on the official website, and submitted works may be introduced on the official X accounts during the event period. 1. Hide “NaviRobo” and “Usernames” in the Options menu. 2. Capture in 1920×1080 (Full HD) or 3840×2160 (4K). 3. Post your screenshots on X with the hashtags (no entry limit!): #HoloearthYou will have plenty of chances to capture the perfect shot! By purchasing an ID Holder, you can rejoin the event through the 3D archive during the event period.・When taking screenshots, we recommend disabling “Motion Blur” in the Options menu (ESC) to prevent blurry photos.・In the event venue, you can press O to adjust the number of avatars rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks or poppers) off, which reduces system load.・By using the “Live Camera” feature added in Ver. 1.3.0.0, you can watch the stage with camera work that follows the performance and stage effects.

item.title: Ver. 1.3.0.0 Release Notes
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: This is the Holoearth Management Team. Holoearth was updated on March 5, 2026. Underworld Geo is now open. Underworld Geo is one of Holoearth’s premier entertainment cities, featuring a theater for enjoying immersive concert performances as well as the Poker Room. Nanaka was added to Focal Square. The Five Succubus Sisters were added to Underworld Geo and the Poker Room. A Live Camera Mode for that can be switched to during concerts was added.4. Items & Customization Options The following new avatar fashion items were added.● Tops ・UG.FROLIC Elegant Dress (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Jacket & Blouse (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Bodysuit ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Jacket● Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Lace Underwear (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・ALTERMODE Piped Underwear● Bottoms ・UG.FROLIC Balloon Shorts (Wine / YelGn / Grp) ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shorts● Socks ・UG.FROLIC Bat & Card Tights ・UG.FROLIC Suspender Socks (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)● Shoes ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Heels ・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Heels (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Shoes (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shoes● Hats ・UG.FROLIC Veil Hat (Gn / YelGn / Grp) ・UG.FROLIC Wings Accessory● Eyewear ・UG.FROLIC Diamond Monocle (Bg / Gry / DkGry)● Earrings ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Earrings● Gloves ・UG.FROLIC Half-Palm Gloves (Blk / Vlt / DkGry)● Hair Accessory ・Underworld Geo Horns● Wrist Accessories ・UG.FROLIC Wrist Cuffs The following new gesture was added.■ Avatar Customization Options The following avatar customization options were added.● Hair (Bangs) ・Over-Eye Asymmetrical Bangs ・Active Asymmetrical Bangs● Hair (Sides) ・Natural Long Side Bangs● Hair (Back) ・Half Side Tail● Contacts ・UG.FROLIC Glamorous Heart● Face Accents ・Dual Color Feather ・Cross ScarImprovements & Adjustments■UI adjustments Change Area, Shop, Change Outfit, and HoloPhone menu icons were added to the top right of the screen.■New idle motions Relax 3 and Relax 4 were added as new idle motions.■HoloPhone update In certain areas such as Focal Square users will now be able to activate the HoloPhone while moving.■Photo Mode update While Photo Mode is active, users an now take pictures using the left mouse button or the Space bar.■Chat feature update In certain areas such as Focal Square chat messages will now be displayed across the entire area.■Change Area for Simulation Room An area selection feature has been added to the Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop.■Avatar customization update Avatars can now be customized without needing Alt Beautys Points or Rebuild Cores.■ Attacking the “Huge Slime” in the Simulation Room will aggro the “Bumble Bees” located far away.■ When attempting to use a serial code, a server error occurs and the item cannot be redeemed.■ If Photo Mode is entered while the username is displayed, the username disappears immediately but reappears after taking a photo once.■ Taking a photo while operating the camera with the mouse in Photo Mode causes the camera to shift after the photo.■ When exiting Photo Mode, gestures and motions are canceled.■ In the Simulation Room, some furniture and monsters turn completely black at night.■ When a display with built-in speakers is connected, official account voice audio plays through the display speakers regardless of sound settings.■ The transparency settings for user-made items configured in Creator Tools are not correctly reflected in-app.■ In the Simulation Room, world quests that have already ended remain on the list and are not marked as completed until the quest issuer logs in.■ Opening the Gift Box while it contains items causes items in it not to appear in the list the first time it is opened.■ When using Bluetooth earphones, sound switches from stereo to mono.■ When displaying the Room List for the second time or later, the refresh button does not become active.■ Changes to gesture settings in the Simulation Room do not save successfully.

item.title: Celebratory Drawn to Dawn: Official Pre-Party with TakoTori Comes to Los Angeles!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: March 5, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce Drawn to Dawn: Official Pre-Party with TakoTori, the very first official concert pre-party, scheduled for March 22nd, 2026 in Los Angeles, California. This exciting new kind of event will be hosted by hololive production in celebration of both the fans’ continued support as well as talents Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina’nis and their first ever concert in the United States.To thank concert-goers for joining the talents on this amazing journey, fans with a valid concert venue ticket to attend Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis 1st Concert “Drawn to Dawn” in person will be eligible to register for a random selection process to gain admission to the pre-party. Registration for this random selection process will be free of charge and will not require any other form of consideration.Lucky fans who are selected from this process will then be invited for a special celebration at no cost. In addition to free on-site giveaways and refreshments, the event will also feature an afternoon of interactive activities with Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina’nis. Gold Glove Bar at Dodgers Stadium 1000 Vin Scully Ave Los Angeles, CA 90026 Daytime Event (More specific start time to be updated) Free (By invitation only) March 4, 2026 18:00 – March 11, 2026 23:59 PST* Successful applicants will be selected at random and informed of results via email on March 16, 2026 23:59 PST.For additional details about this event and the latest updates, please check the official social media accounts below.・ Please note that due to limited capacity this event will be invitation only. Interested attendees may apply via the above Registration Form, with successful applicants to be selected via a random selection process. ・ Applicants must hold a valid concert venue ticket for Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis 1st Concert “Drawn to Dawn” via Ticketmaster and be able to physically attend the event at the above date and location. ・ Applicants must be 18 years or older to attend.Further Terms and Conditions may be found within the Event Registration Form.

Mar 13 “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!On Friday, March 13, 2026, Holoearth will host the event “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth,” featuring hololive 1st Generation member Aki Rosenthal.Become an avatar and share the same space with Aki Rosenthal for the ultimate immersive experience.After the initial performance, participate again via a fully-preserved 3D archive. All you need is a PC (Windows)—no VR equipment is required.To commemorate the event, items inspired by Aki Rosenthal, such as accessories, penlights, and text plates, will be available for purchase. Additionally, as part of supporting the show, a photo contest and other activities are also planned! Event name: “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Date & time (JST): Friday, March 13, 2026 from 21:00 (Area opens at 18:00) Contents: “Monopoly” (new song), MC portion (30 minutes in total) Venue: Holoearth (This performance is pre-recorded.)Participating in the Holoearth event requires a Windows PC with Holoearth installed and a registered account, as well as the in-app item “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder.”Equipping your avatar with the “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder” item will grant access to the in-app venue.Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Experience the event from different angles, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.(Holoearth is available only on Windows.) Please see recommended PC specs on the Holoearth Download page. Note: In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos. Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder *Cannot be purchased repeatedly. ・Allows entry to the Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth event. ・Allows viewing of the 3D archive. ・Included in the cheer set for the event. 240 HoloCoin (Premium) (480 JPY equivalent (tax-included))A special cheer set with items for supporting Aki Rosenthal will also be available for purchase, which includes items such as a mascot hair accessory and penlights. 1,220 HoloCoin (Premium) (2,440 JPY equivalent (tax-included)) ・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder *Cannot be purchased repeatedly ・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore *Cannot be purchased repeatedly ・Rose Knights Hair Accessory ・Aki Rosenthal Live Celebration T (Signed) March 13, 2026 (Fri) from 21:00 (JST)①8:00〜 ②10:00〜 ③12:00〜 ④14:00〜 ⑤16:00〜 ⑥19:00〜 ⑦20:00〜 ⑧21:00〜 ⑨22:00〜 ⑩23:00〜Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes. This performance is pre-recorded. Screenshots from the entire performance may be posted on social media. Videos with audio up to 10-seconds long may be shared on social media. The 3D archive may be played via the event venue screens for activities such as talent watch parties. Due to the nature of this content, which allows users to freely control the camera, it is produced in accordance with international safety standards and guidelines regarding visual display (such as flicker frequency and changes in brightness levels). However, certain user actions may still produce unexpectedly strong visual stimuli. In particular, individuals with a history of photosensitivity (such as photosensitive epilepsy or light-induced sensitivity), those who are sleep-deprived or unwell, and minors should avoid the actions listed below and exercise caution when viewing this content. Rapid and intense camera movements—such as panning quickly from side to side, tilting up and down, or repeatedly zooming in and out—may cause fast motion across the screen and strong flickering.[Sudden Approaches to Light Sources] Suddenly moving the camera close to bright lights used in the live performance (such as stage lighting, lasers, fireworks, or effects), or filling the screen with a bright light source, may cause abrupt changes in brightness. If you experience strong visual stimulation, dizziness, nausea, convulsions, or any vision abnormalities while viewing this content, stop immediately, look away from the screen, and take a break. If symptoms do not improve, promptly seek medical attention.Please view this content at your own risk with thorough understanding of the above potential hazards. We kindly ask for your understanding and cooperation to ensure safe usage. Mirrored streaming of this performance is strictly prohibited. Uploading videos of the paid portion of this performance (after the first song and its MC) to social media or YouTube is prohibited.Event Venue Preview Area!Take an early look at the event venue for “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth.” This area will be a free-admission experience zone, so anyone can enter and get a taste of the event atmosphere ahead of time.Limited-Time Digital Items ・Aki Rosenthal Live Celebration T (No Signature) ・Rose Knights Hair Accessory ・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Penlights are held in both hands when used. These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space. ・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Outfit Acrylic Stand M ・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Outfit Acrylic Stand L ・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Key Visual Acrylic Panel ・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Type A ・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Type B Note: Penlights are held in both hands when used. These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space. ・Aki Rosenthal Text Plage 1 x3 (AkiRose / Otsuta-ru / Alooona / Kanpai! / Thanks for Waiting!)・An issue was confirmed where some penlights may appear as pink squares depending on certain conditions.・If this issue occurs, please try switching to another handheld item and back or unequipping and re-equipping the penlight.Stage & Pathfinder Outfits Available! ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Bodysuit (upper / lower) ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Underwear ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Tights ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Heels ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Mini Hat ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Gloves ・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Wrist Cuffs From March 13, 2026 (Fri) 21:00 (JST) (Schedule is subject to change.) ・Pathfinder Jacket Aki Rosenthal ・Pathfinder Sneakers Aki RosenthalIn the “Underworld Geo” area, an Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth street takeover will also take place.The event shirt will take shape in the real world. The event T-shirt, designed by Aki Rosenthal in Holoearth, is now available on Amazon! It is a unique item that connects two different worlds: the virtual and the real.

item.title: Ver. 1.3.0.0 Announcement: New Area, New Characters, Live Camera Feature
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!Holoearth will be updated to Ver. 1.3.0 on Thursday, March 5, 2026 after maintenance. (Schedule is subject to change.) An underground metropolis built around a huge underground cavern and crash-landed spaceship, featuring resort facilities with various eventsUnderworld Geo is one of Holoearth’s premier entertainment cities, featuring a theater for enjoying immersive concert performances as well as the Poker Room.Be sure to explore this lively city, where you can also enjoy dazzling fireworks and beautiful fountain shows.New Characters: Nanaka and The Five Succubus SistersNew characters will be added to the world of Holoearth as introduced here, so check them out!Area: Focal Square A pathfinder from Realearth. She is a creative with great interest in the excitement of Holoearth. (CV: Maaya Uchida): Underworld Geo, Poker Room The five sisters are: the eldest, Rati; the second, Riti; the third, Ruti; the fourth, Reti; and the youngest, Roti. They are employed by Jabberwock, a prominent figure in Underworld Geo, and work at the resort as staff members.During performances, a new “Live Camera” feature will be added, allowing participants to enjoy visuals that sync with the stage production.In the venue, press V to switch between the normal view, “Manual Camera,” and the performance view, “Automatic Camera.”With“Automatic Camera,” watch the stage through camera work that matches the performers’ actions and stage effects.Choose your preferred perspective and enjoy the show from the best angle possible!While using this new mode, Photo Mode will still be accessible with the P key, however, some features may not work properly.Improvement to Menu UsabilityThe Change Area, Shop, Change Outfit, and HoloPhone icons will now always be displayed on-screen. By pressing the corresponding shortcut keys, users will be able to instantly access each feature.Underworld Geo’s own new brand, UG.FROLIC, will arrive. Other new items will also be available at the fashion shop ALTERMODE, so please look forward to them. ・UG.FROLIC Elegant Dress (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Jacket & Blouse (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Bodysuit ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Jacket ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Lace Underwear (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・ALTERMODE Piped Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Balloon Shorts (Wine / YelGn / Grp) ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shorts ・UG.FROLIC Bat & Card Tights ・UG.FROLIC Suspender Socks (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Heels ・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Heels (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Shoes (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn) ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shoes ・UG.FROLIC Veil Hat (Gn / YelGn / Grp) ・UG.FROLIC Wings Accessory ・UG.FROLIC Diamond Monocle (Bg / Gry / DkGry) ・UG.FROLIC Glamorous Heart ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Earrings ・UG.FROLIC Half-Palm Gloves (Blk / Vlt / DkGry) ・Underworld Geo Horns ・UG.FROLIC Wrist CuffsAfter maintenance a new clapping gesture will be added. March 5, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance.New Customization OptionsNew avatar customization options will be added after maintenance. March 5, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance. ・Over-Eye Asymmetrical Bangs ・Active Asymmetrical Bangs ・Natural Long Side Bangs ・Half Side Tail ・Dual Color Feather ・Cross ScarNew idle motions will be added, which can be changed in the avatar “Change Outfit” menu. In certain areas such as Focal Square users will now be able to activate the HoloPhone while moving.Photo Mode Feature Update While Photo Mode is active, users will be able to take pictures using the left mouse button or the Space bar. In certain areas such as Focal Square chat messages will now be displayed across the entire area.Area Selection in Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop An area selection feature has been added to the Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop.Salon & Clinic Focal Square BranchA Salon & Clinic branch will be added to Focal Square, allowing for greater ease of customizing user avatars.Avatar Customization Feature Update Avatars will now be customizable without needing Alt Beautys Points or Rebuild Cores, and the sale of Rebuild Cores will be discontinued.

item.title: Building Our Future Together: An Interview with COVER CEO Motoaki Tanigo
item.author: COVER_iwasaki
item.content:encoded: To begin with, I would like to express my utmost gratitude to everyone around the world to whom hololive production is a source of daily motivation. At the same time, in recent years and even very recently, there have been incidents that may have caused concern that the company’s support has not been sufficient enough. As the executive responsible for management, I take this very seriously.Nearly three years have passed since we went public amidst the company’s rapid growth. The environment surrounding the company is constantly changing each day, and these changes have not always been what we anticipated. I strongly feel that delays in not addressing such unforeseen circumstances have led members of the community to worry that if this continues, the place we all value so dearly may no longer exist.In light of this situation, we have certainly taken action in a variety of different ways, but we have not been sufficiently transparent with such processes or provided clear responses to the feedback we have received. At the same time, as the company has continued to expand, I personally struggled with distinguishing the company from myself as an individual, and as a result, I have held back from openly expressing my own thoughts and feelings.However, although this is not a dialogue, I felt that there be a place to deliver sincere and candid message in my own words that we are fully aware of the expectations everyone has of us and we are doing our very best to meet them. I believe that I needed to say something not only as the executive of COVER, but also as a fan who cherishes the wonderful space that is hololive production.Of course, it is not possible to openly disclose all of the issues we currently face, but I also fully accept the comments of disapproval asking, “Isn’t it a little too late?” However, the fact that we must continue to make improvements no matter how long it may take is something that is constantly with me, and it starts with me. This is the mindset with which I am approaching this.As the representative of COVER Corporation, I would like to share with everyone my thoughts on what is required in order to protect hololive production.

item.title: hololive production official shop in Harajuku
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: Store Name: hololive production official shop in Harajuku Store Location: Tokyu Plaza Omotesando “OMOKADO”, 4-30-3 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo Opening Date: April 24, 2026 Business Hours: 11:00 – 20:00Due to an anticipated higher volume of customers during the first two days upon opening (April 24 – April 25, 2026), entry will be restricted via advance reservation using “LivePocket-Ticket-”. Please check this page for further details.Official hololive production merchandise, including store-specific merchandise, will be available for purchase! ・ OFFICIAL SHOP exclusive original merchandise ・ Selected merchandise from hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP* ・ Selected hololive production licensed merchandise* Does not include talent anniversary merchandise items and other made-to-order products. * There may be purchase limitations depending on the sales status. * Please note that the items are in limited quantities and will not be available once they are sold out. * We cannot answer any inquiries regarding our inventory, including when the items will be stocked. * Products may be rereleased at future dates after the initial event period has ended. * The actual product may differ from the product sample image.■ Talents of Harajuku Store Official Merchandise Usada Pekora / La+ Darknesss / Kobo Kanaeru / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Isaki Riona / Koganei Niko / Mizumiya Su / Rindo Chihaya / Kikirara ViviAlso debuting is ‘Harajuku Chibi Style,’ featuring a design concept rooted in the signature palette and confectionery culture of Harajuku.■ Talents of Harajuku Chibi style Tsunomaki Watame / Vestia Zeta / IRySPrices and full product lineup will be announced at a later date.1. Every 3,300 Yen (Tax Included) Original Design Bottled Water (2 Random Designs)2. 7,700 Yen or More (Tax Included) Original Vinyl Shopping Bag (1 Design)Additional items are planned for customers using the official holoplus app. (Proof required.)The following special in-store experiences will be available.1. Life-Size hololive Figure Display (Limited Time Event) A life-size figure of Usada Pekora will be on display for a limited time. View this intricately crafted masterpiece in all of its glory! Display Period: April 24, 2026 – May 31, 20262. Spatial Reality Display Sony’s Spatial Reality Display technology allows for clear and vivid stereoscopic viewing – no 3D glasses required! Unique video content will be shown exclusively at the Harajuku store location.* Viewing availability will be limited to a select number of customers per day.■ Talents of Spatial Reality Display Usada Pekora / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Kikirara Vivi3. Special In-Store Broadcast & Autograph Display Newly recorded voice messages from participating hololive members will be broadcast, in addition to replica autographs and messages on display.

item.title: New Shop Opening in Harajuku, the Hub of Trends! “hololive production official shop in Harajuku” Will Launch on April 24, 2026!
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: Featuring exclusive content, such as Spatial Reality Displays, life-size figure, and much, much more!COVER Corp. (Headquarters: Minato-ku, Tokyo; President: Motoaki Tanigawa) will open “hololive production official shop in Harajuku” at OMOKADO on April 24, 2026. This store will be operated in cooperation with KIDDY LAND Co.,Ltd. (Headquarters: Chiyoda, Tokyo; CEO: Takahiko Tsumura).This official hololive production store will premiere in Harajuku, a global hub for culture. In addition to selling original new merchandise featuring newly drawn visuals,.this store will also offer special experiential content unique to the Harajuku location.An eye-catching life-size figure will be on display for a limited time! In addition, custom video content will be shown using a state-of-the-art “Spatial Reality Display”, allowing viewers to enjoy impressive 3D visuals without the need for 3D glasses. The store will deliver a must-see experience that seamlessly blends technology and entertainment. A total of 10 talents will appear in newly created illustrations wearing colorful, pop-inspired Harajuku outfits.Visitors are invited to experience the many features of the hololive production official shop in Harajuku. Due to an anticipated higher volume of customers during the first two days upon opening (April 24 – April 25, 2026), entry will be restricted via advance reservation using “LivePocket-Ticket-”. Please check the official website for further details.Official hololive production merchandise, including store-specific merchandise, will be available for purchase.* Purchase restrictions may be imposed based on product availability. * Available while supplies last. Product availability may vary. * Individual inquiries related to product availability (e.g. quantities; resupplying; etc.) will not be accepted. * Products may be rereleased at future dates after the initial event period has ended. * Images are for illustrative purposes only. Actual products may differ. * Prices and full product lineup will be announced at a later date.【Talents of Harajuku Store Official Merchandise】 Usada Pekora / La+ Darknesss / Kobo Kanaeru / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Isaki Riona / Koganei Niko / Mizumiya Su / Rindo Chihaya / Kikirara Vivi・ Outfit Design Supervision: ジぅ( ･w･ ） ・ Full-Body Illustrations: 犬乃ぴすけ ・ Mini Character Illustrations: みやAlso debuting is ‘Harajuku Chibi Style,’ featuring a design concept rooted in the signature palette and confectionery culture of Harajuku.【Talents of Harajuku Chibi style】 Tsunomaki Watame / Vestia Zeta / IRyS・ Harajuku Chibi style Illustrations: みや ・ store-specific merchandise ・ hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP Selected Products ・ Selected licensed merchandise related to hololive production* Purchase restrictions may be imposed based on product availability.Special gifts created for the Harajuku store will be available on a first-come, first-served basis with qualifying in-store purchases.・ Every 3,300 Yen (Tax Included): Original Design Bottled Water (2 Random Designs) ・ 7,700 Yen or More (Tax Included): Original Vinyl Shopping Bag (1 Design)* Additional items are planned for customers using the official holoplus app. (Proof required.) * Available while supplies last.The following special in-store experiences will be available.1. Life-Size hololive Figure Display (Limited Time Event) A life-size figure of Usada Pekora will be on display for a limited time. View this intricately crafted masterpiece in all of its glory! Display Period: April 24, 2026 – May 31, 20262. Spatial Reality Display Sony’s Spatial Reality Display technology allows for clear and vivid stereoscopic viewing – no 3D glasses required! Unique video content will be shown exclusively at the Harajuku store location.* Viewing availability will be limited to a select number of customers per day.【Talents of Spatial Reality Display】 Usada Pekora / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Kikirara Vivi3. Special In-Store Broadcast & Autograph Display Newly recorded voice messages from participating hololive members will be broadcast, in addition to replica autographs and messages on display.

item.title: hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 Holoearth Booth Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Thank you for your support of Holoearth.Holoearth will be exhibiting a booth at “hololive SUPER EXPO 2026,” one of the largest offline events hosted by hololive production, to be held at Makuhari Messe from March 6 to 8, 2026.At the Holoearth booth, we plan to screen special footage from past events such as the “Arrival Festivals” and “NePoLaBo Live,” featuring hololive production talents.There will also be displays where visitors experience Holoearth’s journey so far in a real-world setting, including life-size panels of talents from past Arrival Festival events.We hope you enjoy the world of Holoearth at hololive SUPER EXPO 2026!

item.title: Octopus x hololive 3rd Generation Physical Card Collection is Now Available for Pre-Order!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: February 27, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce the renewed collaboration between hololive production and Octopus Card, unveiling a special series of physical Octopus card sets featuring the talents of hololive 3rd Generation.Octopus Card Collection DetailsThe hololive 3rd Generation Octopus Card collection comes in two versions: a Single Card Set and a Collector’s Set, tailored for both practical users and passionate collectors.Dressed in autumn‑winter school uniforms, the four members are ready to accompany you across Hong Kong—ride the MTR, board double‑decker buses, tour on trams, and sail the harbour—making them part of your daily commute and city exploration!Set Includes: ・ hololive 3rd Generation Physical Octopus Card ・ Octopus Card Holder with LanyardSet Includes: ・ hololive 3rd Generation Physical Octopus Card ・ Octopus Slide-on Card Holder ・ Card Display Stand ・ Acrylic Shikishi Artboard ・ Gift Box PackagingPre‑order your exclusive Octopus Card today and let hololive 3rd Generation members join you as you journey through Hong Kong!Octopus is a contactless stored value card that provides customers with a simple, safe, and secure way to pay. First launched in 1997 across public transport systems, the applications of the Octopus card have since expanded to include retail stores and various facilities, making everyday life more convenient.

item.content:encoded: このページはEXPO・フェスのグッズや特典、ノベルティ情報のみを集約したものです。イベント詳細につきましては公式サイトをご覧ください。※公式サイトや各企業より発表された内容のみ記載しています。※当日発表される情報や未公開情報は含まれません。オフィシャルグッズが購入できるエリアEXPO または fesのチケットを持ってる方が入場できます。︎現地受け取り事前販売2月19日20:00〜26日23:59︎当日販売3月6日9:00 ～ 8日18:00︎事後通販3月6日12:00〜4月27日18:00EXPO または fesのチケットを持ってる方が入場できます。・ファンクラブ会員限定「EXPOオリジナルステッカー」プレゼント・新規加入&友達紹介キャンペーンミッションクリアでもれなくホロドリPRパックをプレゼント詳細は入場時に入っている案内 または 会場内QRコードでご確認下さいオリジナルフード・ドリンクが購入できるエリア（複製手書きPOPカード・ランチョンマット・コースターなど特典あり）︎先行販売2月20日20:00～26日23:59︎当日販売3月6〜8日 9:30〜17:30「Advent VS Justice」オリジナルアパレル実物展⽰今回のEXPO＆ fes.イベントオリジナルグッズを展示企画参加した方の中から抽選で当選された方に特典プレゼント※詳しくはホロプラスをチェック・未来のシリーズデザイン会場限定ウエハースカード配布（各日なくなり次第終了）・先行ガシャポン販売・今後販売予定の商品展示・新作フィギュア展示・最新フィギュア化情報公開予定・過去のプライズ、最新アイテムを展示・受注販売予定のぽこべぇ1/1フィギュアお披露目・超特大「もちぴこBIGぬいぐるみ」の限定展示フォトスポット・クレーンゲームで「寝そべりミニマスコット」を先行ゲット(有料プレイ)・オリジナルデザインのステッカー9種をランダム配布・hololiveEN コラボPC展開中（展示あり？）・マーケットエリアにてコラボグッズ販売あり・26年5月から全国巡回するPOP UPプロジェクト「hololive BASE on Tour! 2026 Duet Stage!」の描き下ろしビジュアルを初公開・チラシの配布（巡回会場へ持参すると、追加特典がもらえるチャンスあり）・hololive×Anideal 第3弾 香水の展示・香り付きムエット配布・ミッションをクリアしてノベルティプレゼント（ノベルティは一人１枚・なくなり次第終了）・新作の等身大フィギュアとスケールフィギュアをお披露目・オリジナルブランド「AXGRIT」新作フィギュア発表、ジオラマ展示・フィギュアシリーズ PalVerseの展示・最新フィギュア化情報発表・会場限定ステッカーがもらえるSNSキャンペーンあり・カラオケ大会開催（例年通りであればポスターなどがもらえる可能性あり）・「スズキ × 輪堂千速」コラボバイクGSX250R [Chihaya Remix]展示3月6〜8日に関東付近でおこなわれているイベント・コラボをまとめました。地方から訪れる方、海外ニキ、ホロリス同士での交流・観光のご参考にどうぞ。hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station︎場所東京駅『東京キャラクターストリート』︎内容ホロライブグッズ取扱(「hololive TRAVEL」シリーズVol.3販売開始)成田空港「hololive Meet Pop up Shop」との連動企画hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport!︎場所成田空港︎内容hololive Meet アンバサダーグッズ販売SHIBUYA TSUTAYA 「hololive 6th fes.」企画展⽰︎場所SHIBUYA TSUTAYA ︎内容公式グッズや過去のhololive SUPER EXPO ＆ fes.グッズの一部販売あり「魔法少女ホロウィッチ！」 完結記念フェア&POPUP in ゲーマーズ︎場所東京都秋葉原（その他地方にも対象店舗あり）︎内容対象商品購入で書き下ろししおりプレゼントホロライブゲーマーズ × 極楽湯 RAKUSPA フロライフ コラボ︎場所関東14店舗あり︎内容グッズ販売、コラボフード、ノベルティ配布、コラボ風呂などホロツリねぽらぼ POP-UP SHOP & CAFE ︎場所ツリービレッジ東京店（東京都墨田区）︎内容グッズ販売、コラボフード、ノベルティ配布などhololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 ～みるハコで叫べ愛のコール～みるハコ視聴 DAY1︎場所カラオケ「JOYSOUND」対象店舗︎内容ライブ視聴（グッズ付きチケットあり）︎場所関東に対象店舗複数あり︎内容限定プライズグッズ設置、投入金額に応じてノベルティプレゼント、限定装飾店などモンハンワイルズ × ホロライブ ねぽらぼコラボカフェ︎場所カプコンカフェ池袋（大阪梅田にも対象店舗あり）︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、ノベルティ配布など︎場所東京会場(新宿)︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、ノベルティ配布などホロライブ×狭山スキー場 「Sayama hololive Snow Party」︎場所狭山スキー場（埼玉県所沢市）︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、謎解きイベントなどTSUTAYA BOOKSTORE川崎駅前店・横須賀粟田店限定キャンペーン︎場所TSUTAYA BOOKSTORE 川崎駅前店・横須賀粟田店︎内容ポストカードプレゼント︎場所東京を中心に多数店舗あり︎内容コラボさくら餡たい焼き販売、グッズ販売など︎場所東京・千葉合わせて250店舗以上あり︎内容hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME プレゼント、点数を集めてグッズゲットなど

item.title: “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Event Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!On March 13, 2026, a virtual concert titled “Aki Rosenthal Birthday Encore in Holoearth,” featuring Aki Rosenthal from hololive production, will take place in Holoearth.Virtual Concert “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth”In Holoearth, become your own avatar and share the same space as Aki Rosenthal. Enjoy an immersive experience from your favorite perspective within arm’s reach.This event will also feature exclusive MC segments you can only see in Holoearth, along with a special venue, stage production, and cheer items.Stay tuned for more details! Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth March 13 (Fri), 2026 at 21:00 (JST) (Schedule is subject to change.)

hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S) is coming to Singapore on May 16, 2026!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: February 16, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce its participation in the special event, “hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S).” This event will be held in Singapore on May 16, 2026 as part of the 60th Anniversary of the Establishment of Diplomatic Relations between Japan and Singapore (SJ60).Four globally recognized hololive production talents representing different regions will participate: (hololive / Tokyo Tourism Ambassador): #hololive_SJ60: hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S): Saturday, May 16, 2026: Jurong East Stadium (Singapore): Albirex Niigata Singapore vs Young Lions: 3,500 spectators: SGD 21 (± JPY 2,500): DOU Creations Pte Ltd: Football Association of Singapore* The football match will be held as an official Singapore Premier League fixture. Separate match tickets are required.On match day, the stadium will be transformed into a unique entertainment experience combining real sports and virtual culture.Planned highlights include: ・ Screening of original music videos ・ Special greetings & Q&A session (pre-recorded) ・ Multilingual challenge segment ・ Exclusive halftime performanceIn addition, Mori Calliope is scheduled to host a YouTube mirror livestream, allowing fans worldwide to enjoy the event online.■ Livestream Schedule (Subject to Change) May 16, 2026 (Sat) 19:30 – 22:30 (JST) A detailed timetable will be announced at a later date.SJ60 Limited-Edition Collaboration MerchandiseExclusive collaboration merchandise featuring newly illustrated visuals will be available both onsite and through advance online sales, through an event-exclusive website. Items ship to Japan and all 11 countries and regions in Southeast Asia. For detailed information, please visit the official collaboration website. ・ Replica Uniform (1 type)・ Acrylic Stands (4 types): February 16, 2026, 10:00 (JST): March 1, 2026, 17:00 (JST)* With limited exceptions, merchandise will be available primarily through advance sales. * On-site sales on match day will be extremely limited. Advance purchase is strongly recommended. * Selected items will be available exclusively via pre-order.For online sales and the latest updates, please visit the official campaign website.Significance as an SJ60 Commemorative EventThis project represents a future-oriented cultural exchange, bringing together Japan’s leading digital entertainment brand and Singapore’s community-rooted Japanese football club .Through the fusion of VTuber culture and live sports, the event aims to create an unprecedented celebration of friendship between Japan and Singapore for the next generation.: Official announcement & merchandise sales begin: Event dayDOU Creations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based business strategy and marketing consultancy dedicated to breaking down market borders and supporting Japanese companies and content to expand overseas, particularly in Southeast Asia. The company provides comprehensive services spanning business strategy development, market research, product planning, and local execution of branding and marketing activities. With a mission to help Japanese products and cultural IP reach global audiences, DOU Creations has supported initiatives such as the operation of Japanese Film Week events and cultural festival booths abroad.

item.title: カバー株式会社による米国での著作権侵害訴訟（「マリアのVTuberにうず」）
item.content:encoded: 米国の裁判資料を検索していたら、おもしろい資料を見つけたので、紹介します。VTuberプロダクション「ホロライブプロダクション」を運営するカバー株式会社によって米国カリフォルニア州北部地区連邦地方裁判所で、カバー株式会社から日本に居住する男性に著作権侵害を理由とした訴訟が提起されています。続きをみる

item.title: Notice of Price Changes (Feb 20 Update)
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Thank you for using the Holoearth service.In a commitment to a more accessible platform for users, we are sold in Holoearth.The revised prices can be confirmed in the in-app purchase screen from the effective date. There will be no change to the purchase price of HoloCoin (Premium). There will be no changes to content that has already been purchased. This revision applies only to ; user-made items will not be affected. Maintenance will be performed on . The specific time will be shared at a later date.Thank you for your continued support.

item.title: Visit both Tokyo Station and Narita Airport shops to get an exclusive postcard!
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: To celebrate the opening of “hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport!” we are excited to announce a special collaboration campaign with the “hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station.”During the campaign period, bring a receipt from one shop to the other to receive an exclusive, limited-edition postcard (not for sale) as a special gift! Don’t miss this chance to visit both locations and collect these unique rewards. Friday, February 13, 2026 – Monday, March 9, 2026・ hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station Venue: Tokyo Character Street, B1, First Avenue Tokyo Stationhere for more details.・ hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport! Venue: Central Bldg. 4F, Terminal 1, Narita Airporthere for more details. 1. Make a purchase at either participating shop. 2. Bring your receipt to the other shop. 3. Show your receipt to the staff at the cashier to receive your postcard.* Staff will mark the receipt once the gift has been redeemed. The exclusive postcards (not for sale) come in 5 designs in total, and designs vary by shop and distribution period.・ At hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station: Phase 1: Feb 13 (Fri) – Feb 27 (Fri) Phase 2: Feb 28 (Sat) – Mar 9 (Mon)・ At hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Phase 1: Feb 13 (Fri) – Feb 20 (Fri) Phase 2: Feb 21 (Sat) – Feb 27 (Fri) Phase 3: Feb 28 (Sat) – Mar 9 (Mon)・ Postcard designs will change according to the schedule at each shop. ・ Supplies are limited and will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis while stocks last. ・ Only receipts issued during the campaign period (Feb 13 – Mar 9, 2026) are valid for redemption. ・ Each receipt is valid for one (1) postcard. ・ We cannot accept returns or exchanges for the postcard, except in the case of defective items. ・ Please check the official website of each facility for business hours and access information.
